system.effect: The affected limb is severely damaged and cannot be used. If a leg, the character's movement is halved and they cannot Run or Charge. If an arm, they cannot use that arm for any purpose.
system.removal: Requires extended medical care or bionic replacement. A Crippled limb cannot be healed by first aid alone.

description.value: One of the character's limbs has been severely damaged and is rendered useless. A Crippled arm cannot hold items or be used for tests requiring two hands. A Crippled leg halves the character's movement rate and prevents Running or Charging. This condition persists until the limb is properly treated through extended medical care or replaced with a bionic.

system.notes: Specify which limb is Crippled when applying this condition.
